name: chrome-ext
description: Chrome extension bridge — control real Chrome browser tabs, windows, and DOM via WebSocket
trait: Use chrome_list_tabs, chrome_activate_tab, chrome_open_tab, chrome_close_tab, chrome_read_page, chrome_click, chrome_type, and chrome_screenshot to control real Chrome browser tabs via the installed extension. Best for interacting with the user's actual browser session rather than a headless one.
